center.name: Sierra de Lema
center.summary: Sierra de Lema是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Guianan schiffornis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits the interior of humid and wet forest; it also is found, though rarely, at the forest edge and in mature secondary forest. It is mostly a bird of the lowlands but has been heard at about in the Sierra de Lema in Bolívar.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L
